title: cakile edentula subsp. lacustris
intro: Cakile edentula subsp. lacustris, also known as lacustrine sea rocket or lacustrine cakile, is a subspecies of the Cakile edentula plant, a perennial or biennial herb native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of saponins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Cakile edentula subsp. lacustris include its potential to soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and salves, although its use should be under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
